sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50223" key="i)qu/trhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰθύ-τρην</orth> (neut. sg.),= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰθύτρητον</foreign>, <sense id="n50223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bored straight</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:128" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">128</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
